key_points: Percentages can be converted into fractions and decimals easily
To find percentage of a number multiply the number by the percentage fraction
Percentage increase compares the increase with the original value
Percentage decrease compares the decrease with the original value
Profit and loss help determine gain or loss in a transaction
exam_tips: Always identify the original value before calculating percentage change
Write percentage values correctly with the % symbol
Check whether the problem is about increase or decrease
